description: Generate color palettes from a seed color

attributes.name: seed
attributes.description: Hex seed color (e.g. "#6366f1"). Overridden by child input if present

attributes.name: harmony
attributes.description: Algorithm: complementary, analogous, triadic, split-complementary, tetradic, monochromatic

attributes.name: include-seed
attributes.description: Whether the seed appears in the palette (default: true, implicit)

attributes.name: show-export
attributes.description: Show Copy Hex / Copy CSS toolbar below the palette

attributes.name: show-values
attributes.description: Inherited: always show hex values on swatches
